title: lonchocarpus nicou var. typicus
intro: Lonchocarpus nicou var. typicus, also known as the "Cedre du Sénégal" or West African Cedar, is a medicinal plant species native to West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus nicou var. typicus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark is typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
